_comment: Regulatory framework database for Feature 4 (Compliance Intelligence). SYNTHETIC/DEMONSTRATIVE: the requirement text below is a plain-language paraphrase derived from the sample corpus and common Indian industrial-safety practice — it is NOT the verbatim legal text of OISD/PESO/Factory Act/ISO standards and must not be treated as an authoritative regulatory source. Point IKI_REGULATORY_FRAMEWORK_PATH at a copy of this file to calibrate to your site's real, licensed clause text. Each requirement lists 'evidence_keywords' (terms whose presence in a regulation-referencing document counts as coverage) and 'evidence_procedures' (procedure-ID prefixes that satisfy it, e.g. SOP/PM/JSA).

requirements.text: Rotating-equipment maintenance shall follow a documented lockout and seal-replacement procedure before any intrusive work.
Pressure-relief devices on rotating/pressure equipment shall be tested on the required quarterly cadence with complete records.
Vibration trends for critical rotating equipment shall be monitored and documented under the maintenance programme.

PESO.title: Petroleum & Explosives Safety Organisation — pressure system licensing

requirements.text: A current operating licence shall be held for every regulated pressure system.
Hydrostatic pressure-test certificates shall be on file for all regulated pressure vessels.
Worker safety training records shall be current for all personnel operating rotating or pressure equipment.
Emergency evacuation drills shall be conducted and documented under the Factory Act safety programme.
A documented quality-management system shall govern maintenance and inspection activities.
Inspection findings shall be recorded against equipment with a disposition and follow-up.
Environmental controls shall be documented for equipment with environmental impact.
Biocide and effluent treatment of cooling systems shall be carried out and recorded on schedule.
